terminal/ghostty.analysis: Ghostty scores 97% (130/134) on the terminfo.dev feature matrix, with gaps in the Rich Terminal baseline. Ranks #2 of 8 tested terminals. Missing: Tertiary Device Attributes (DA3), Sixel graphics, Kitty graphics protocol.

terminal/kitty.analysis: Kitty scores 92% (123/134) on the terminfo.dev feature matrix, with gaps in the Modern TUI, Rich Terminal, Unicode Text baselines. Ranks #7 of 8 tested terminals. Missing 10 features.

terminal/iterm2.analysis: iTerm2 scores 99% (133/134) on the terminfo.dev feature matrix, with gaps in the Rich Terminal baseline. Ranks #1 of 8 tested terminals. Uniquely supports: Tertiary Device Attributes (DA3), Kitty graphics protocol. Missing: Sixel graphics.

terminal/terminal-app.analysis: Terminal.app scores 92% (123/134) on the terminfo.dev feature matrix, with gaps in the Modern TUI, Rich Terminal, Unicode Text baselines. Ranks #8 of 8 tested terminals. Missing 10 features.

terminal/warp.analysis: Warp scores 93% (124/134) on the terminfo.dev feature matrix, with gaps in the Modern TUI, Rich Terminal, Unicode Text baselines. Ranks #5 of 8 tested terminals. Missing 9 features.

terminal/cursor.analysis: Cursor scores 93% (125/134) on the terminfo.dev feature matrix, with gaps in the Rich Terminal, Unicode Text baselines. Ranks #4 of 8 tested terminals. Missing: Tertiary Device Attributes (DA3), XTGETTCAP (Query Terminfo), Emoji ZWJ sequences (2 cols), Variation selector 16 (emoji presentation), Kitty keyboard protocol, Sixel graphics, Grapheme Cluster Cursor Movement, Kitty graphics protocol.

terminal/vs-code.analysis: VS Code scores 94% (126/134) on the terminfo.dev feature matrix, with gaps in the Rich Terminal, Unicode Text baselines. Ranks #3 of 8 tested terminals. Missing: Tertiary Device Attributes (DA3), XTGETTCAP (Query Terminfo), Emoji ZWJ sequences (2 cols), Variation selector 16 (emoji presentation), Sixel graphics, Grapheme Cluster Cursor Movement, Kitty graphics protocol.

baseline/core.analysis: All 8 tested terminals achieve 100% Core Terminal compliance.

baseline/modern.analysis: 5 of 8 tested terminals achieve 100% Modern TUI compliance. Lagging: Kitty (96%), Terminal.app (96%), Warp (98%). Most commonly missing: Mode Reporting (DECRPM), Origin mode (DECOM).

baseline/rich.analysis: 0 of 8 tested terminals achieve 100% Rich Terminal compliance. Lagging: Cursor (65%), Kitty (71%), Terminal.app (71%). Most commonly missing: Kitty graphics protocol, Tertiary Device Attributes (DA3), Sixel graphics.

baseline/unicode.analysis: 2 of 8 tested terminals achieve 100% Unicode Text compliance. Lagging: Kitty (63%), Terminal.app (63%), Warp (63%). Most commonly missing: Variation selector 16 (emoji presentation), Emoji ZWJ sequences (2 cols), Grapheme Cluster Cursor Movement.

compare/ghostty-vs-kitty.analysis: Ghostty scores 97% (130/134) vs Kitty at 92% (123/134). Ghostty leads by 5 percentage points. Only in Ghostty: Mode Reporting (DECRPM), DECRQSS (Request Setting), XTGETTCAP (Query Terminfo), Emoji ZWJ sequences (2 cols), Variation selector 16 (emoji presentation) and 3 more. Only in Kitty: Sixel graphics.
